text: Spread Placement Groups @ uostseamaniia @ ssancanc * Provides infrastructure isolation e ...each INSTANCE runs from a different rack e Each rack has its own network and power source ¢ 7 Instances per AZ (HARD LIMIT) * Not supported for Dedicated Instances or Hosts e Use Case : Small number of critical instances that need to be kept separated from each other
